title: Propagating T5-phages for Fluorescent Staining
author: Dr. Steven Wilhelm
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.igzcbx6

steps.title: Grow a culture of E
steps.instruction: Grow a culture of E.coli ATCC11303 in LB media overnight

steps.title: The next morning, prewarm LB-agar plates to 37ºC
steps.instruction: The next morning, prewarm LB-agar plates to 37ºC

steps.title: Pellet 1 mL of the cells...
steps.instruction: Pellet 1 mL of the cells in an Eppendorf tube at 10,000 xg, 2 min 00:02:00

steps.title: Discard the medium
steps.instruction: Discard the medium

steps.title: Resuspend the pellet into 1 mL...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the pellet into 1 mL 10 mM MgSO 4 undetermined Magnesium sulfate heptahydrate Contributed by users

steps.title: Melt 0
steps.instruction: Melt 0.6% top agar in the microwave

steps.title: Prepare sterile 5 mL tubes and...
steps.instruction: Prepare sterile 5 mL tubes and pipet 3 mL of melted top agar into them undetermined

steps.title: Keep tubes in 45ºC heat block...
steps.instruction: Keep tubes in 45ºC heat block or water bath so that the agar stays in a liquid state, but not too hot to kill the cells.

steps.title: Add 10 µL T5 from the...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µL T5 from the stock (except the control) to 100 µL of resuspended cells

steps.title: Incubate 5 min at room temperature 00:05:00
steps.instruction: Incubate 5 min at room temperature 00:05:00

steps.title: Add the infected cells to the molton top agar
steps.instruction: Add the infected cells to the molton top agar

steps.title: Vortex briefly
steps.instruction: Vortex briefly

steps.title: Pour onto prewarmed LB agar plate...
steps.instruction: Pour onto prewarmed LB agar plate and tilt the plate to spread

steps.title: Let top agar solidify ~30-60 min 01:00:00
steps.instruction: Let top agar solidify ~30-60 min 01:00:00

steps.title: Evert plates and return to 37ºC incubator
steps.instruction: Evert plates and return to 37ºC incubator

steps.title: Let grow ~6-8 hrs 08:00:00
steps.instruction: Let grow ~6-8 hrs 08:00:00

steps.title: When confluent plaques are seen on...
steps.instruction: When confluent plaques are seen on the plate, add 5 mL of sterile phage buffer (10 mM MgSO 4 ; 1 mM CaCl 2 ; 10 mM Tris-HCl, pH 7.5; 1% gelatin)

steps.title: Let the plates sit overnight at...
steps.instruction: Let the plates sit overnight at 4ºC with the buffer on top to gather the phages

steps.title: The next day, transfer the liquid...
steps.instruction: The next day, transfer the liquid from the plates to a sterile tube and add 100 µL chloroform and 5 mL phage buffer

steps.title: Shake for 1 min to let chloroform settle out 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Shake for 1 min to let chloroform settle out 00:01:00

steps.title: Transfer 4 mL of the supernatant...
steps.instruction: Transfer 4 mL of the supernatant to a fresh tube undetermined

steps.title: Filter the solution with 0
steps.instruction: Filter the solution with 0.22 µm pore size syringe filter to get rid of all the cellular debris

steps.title: Store phage at 4ºC
steps.instruction: Store phage at 4ºC. They will stay infective for >1 yr. Fluorescent Staining of T5-phages by Steven W Wilhelm
